info.title: RaktaSetu NOOR
info.description: Empathetic, Predictive Blood Management Infrastructure for Thalassemia Care.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all enrolled patients.
Retrieves detailed demographic and clinical status for a specific patient.

post.description:
Logs a new clinical hemoglobin reading for a patient.

If the reading is marked as post-transfusion and units are provided, this calculates
the incremental Hb rise per unit based on the most recent pre-transfusion reading.
Upon successful log, updates the patient's current Hb status and invalidates 
cached clinical forecasts in Redis.

get.description:
Retrieves or generates a clinical hemoglobin decay forecast and diagnostic alerts.

Checks the Redis cache first for fresh predictions. On a cache miss, trains a
Facebook Prophet model, computes sequential CUSUM alloimmunization, evaluates iron overload,
caches results, and updates patient prediction metadata.

Args:
    patient_id: Unique identifier for the patient.
    db: Async database session.
    
Returns:
    ApiResponse containing the full clinical ForecastResponse.

Retrieves the clinical guardian circle details, continuous health scores,
and current T-minus countdown mobilization states.

Args:
    patient_id: Unique database identifier of the patient.
    db: Async database session.
    
Returns:
    ApiResponse containing the detailed GuardianCircleResponse.

post.description:
Manually activates the mobilization sequence for the patient's network.
If Suresh is pending, transitions his status to active and updates calculations.

Args:
    patient_id: Unique database identifier of the patient.
    db: Async database session.
    
Returns:
    ApiResponse containing the updated MobilizationStatusResponse.

Triggers an empathetic notification to the patient's primary guardian regarding a clinical alert.
Fetches details, formats dynamic context, calls Claude, and dispatches via Twilio.

Args:
    patient_id (str): Unique database identifier of the patient.
    alert_id (str): Unique database identifier of the clinical alert.
    db (AsyncSession): Active async database session.

Returns:
    ApiResponse containing the NotifyAlertResponse details.

get.description:
Retrieves the city-wide optimization grid including blood bank nodes,
calculated transfer matches, coverage percentages, and total inventory summaries.
Enforces Redis caching with a 6-hour TTL.

post.description:
Approves a blood transfer match, decrements available inventory units in the DB,
and invalidates the city grid Redis cache.

Bulk upserts a blood bank's inventory using structured inputs,
and invalidates the associated city's grid cache.

Handles virtual coordination questions from guardians and donors.
Extracts intents using standard regex pattern matching and returns DB-sourced replies.

Args:
    payload (ChatbotMessageRequest): Input message content with optional patient/guardian contexts.
    db (AsyncSession): Active async database session.

Returns:
    ApiResponse containing the ChatbotMessageResponse.

AlertFlagSchema.title: AlertFlagSchema
AlertFlagSchema.description: Clinical and logistical warning alert envelope.

ApiError.title: ApiError
ApiError.description: Standard error envelope for API failure responses.

BloodBankNodeSchema.title: BloodBankNodeSchema
BloodBankNodeSchema.description: Schema representing a blood bank node in the optimization grid.

BulkInventoryUpsertSchema.title: BulkInventoryUpsertSchema
BulkInventoryUpsertSchema.description: Payload schema for bulk upserting a blood bank's inventory.

message.title: Message
message.description: Message string inputted by the user or donor

patient_id.title: Patient Id
patient_id.description: Optional unique identifier of the patient context

guardian_id.title: Guardian Id
guardian_id.description: Optional unique identifier of the guardian context

language.title: Language
language.description: Preferred language for the response (e.g. en, te)

ChatbotMessageRequest.title: ChatbotMessageRequest
ChatbotMessageRequest.description: Schema for incoming messages sent to the Saathi virtual coordinator assistant.

reply.title: Reply
reply.description: Empathetic reply message from Saathi assistant

context_retrieved.title: Context Retrieved
context_retrieved.description: Key-value dictionary showing metadata or clinical database records queried to form the answer

ChatbotMessageResponse.title: ChatbotMessageResponse
ChatbotMessageResponse.description: Schema for the chatbot response containing the virtual assistant's reply and clinical context.

CityInventoryResponse.title: CityInventoryResponse
CityInventoryResponse.description: Schema representing the optimization summary and mappings for a city.

ForecastPointSchema.title: ForecastPointSchema
ForecastPointSchema.description: Strict schema mapping individual daily forecast coordinates for the 60-day prediction curve.

ForecastResponse.title: ForecastResponse
ForecastResponse.description: Complete clinical diagnostic output from the NOOR forecasting pipeline.

GuardianCircleResponse.title: GuardianCircleResponse
GuardianCircleResponse.description:
Structured clinical response envelope for patients' RaktaMitra circles,
incorporating coverage, engagement, and pair-survivability resilience metrics.

GuardianSchema.title: GuardianSchema
GuardianSchema.description:
Strict schema representing a circle member or rare specialist candidate.
Enforces privacy by masking phone numbers as phone_last4 at the serialization boundary.

HbReadingCreate.title: HbReadingCreate
HbReadingCreate.description: Input schema for logging new hemoglobin check readings.

HbReadingResponse.title: HbReadingResponse
HbReadingResponse.description: Response schema for a successfully logged Hb reading record.

HbReadingSchema.title: HbReadingSchema
HbReadingSchema.description:
Strict Pydantic schema representing individual patient hemoglobin log records.
Ensures precise dates are serialized as GFM-compliant ISO strings.

InventoryItemSchema.title: InventoryItemSchema
InventoryItemSchema.description: Schema for a single inventory item to ingest or update.

InventoryMatchSchema.title: InventoryMatchSchema
InventoryMatchSchema.description: Schema representing a single clinical inventory-to-patient transfer match.

MobilizationStatusResponse.title: MobilizationStatusResponse
MobilizationStatusResponse.description: Response envelope containing current T-minus countdown details.

delivery_status.title: Delivery Status
delivery_status.description: Delivery status of the alert (e.g. sent, mock_sent, cached)

recipient_phone.title: Recipient Phone
recipient_phone.description: Masked or unmasked recipient phone number

message_body.title: Message Body
message_body.description: Final message body dispatched to the recipient

NotifyAlertResponse.title: NotifyAlertResponse
NotifyAlertResponse.description: Schema for the response of an alert notification dispatch attempt.

PatientDetail.title: PatientDetail
PatientDetail.description: Detailed patient schema including base fields.

PatientListResponse.title: PatientListResponse
PatientListResponse.description: Envelope for patient directory list responses.

PatientSchema.title: PatientSchema
PatientSchema.description: Schema representing core patient details in the RaktaSetu ecosystem.

TypeCoverageSchema.title: TypeCoverageSchema
TypeCoverageSchema.description: Schema tracking coverage performance metrics for specific blood groups.
